user.title: Hamster MCP
user.description: Set up the Hamster MCP server to expose Home Assistant services via the Model Context Protocol.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of Hamster MCP is allowed.

data_description.auto_fetch_docs: Automatically fetch WebSocket command documentation when the integration loads.
data_description.docs_url_template: URL template for fetching the WebSocket API docs markdown. Use {ref} as a placeholder for the git ref. Works with GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, or any raw file URL.
data_description.docs_git_ref: Branch, tag, or commit hash substituted into the URL template (e.g. "master").

refresh_docs.name: Refresh WebSocket docs
refresh_docs.description: Fetch WebSocket command documentation and enrich the hass group commands with descriptions. Uses the URL template and git ref from integration options by default.

git_ref.name: Git ref
git_ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit hash to fetch documentation from. Defaults to the value configured in the integration options.
